def negative_repeated_deepcopy_in_loop_on_same_source_object():
    rule_id = "repeated_deepcopy_in_loop_on_same_source_object"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "copy.deepcopy called on the same large object on every iteration of a loop."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
